seeded_regulators.description: List of regulator codes for which seed templates are installed (read-only display)

signed_receipt_required.description: Require a SHA-256 + RSA-PSS signed receipt to be generated for every report before it can be submitted

auto_submit_enabled.description: Automatically POST generated reports to the configured regulator endpoint (requires webhook_token)

default_format.description: Default output format shown in the Report Detail generate form

pre_flight_checks_enabled.description: Run missing-data, stale-signature, and retention-violation checks before allowing report generation

retention_days_for_submissions.description: How long to retain submission receipt records (days). Default 2555 = 7 years

webhook_token.description: Bearer token sent in the Authorization header when auto-submitting to regulator endpoints (leave blank to disable auto-submit)
